name: Haley Stevens
subject: Debbie Stabenow Just Endorsed Me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Michigan
body:
I'm honored to have the support of one of Michigan's greatest champions.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYWxleWZvcm1pLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.xacD2YLbX4eknF5lhOfVajsfMemQBXGWbEc1Pw6aNCk?) for more
---
# [Debbie Stabenow Just Endorsed Me](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=196707664&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk2NzA3NjY0LCJpYXQiOjE3NzgxMTIyMDYsImV4cCI6MTc4MDcwNDIwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.WjXoDearNyvvHdxycXfS3K3sRpa_mo0_hwXgb95nYqA)
### I'm honored to have the support of one of Michigan's greatest champions.
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| May 7
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack..LtwgBCk-ondmOGuXs9p7nlgi8a0BQqMJ-0Z-Ajy63U8?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/debbie-stabenow-just-endorsed-me?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

**I 'm honored to share that former U.S. Senator Debbie Stabenow has endorsed me for the U.S. Senate in Michigan.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0e212780-8190-4ce3-b7e8-69d9a6167acc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I truly could not ask for a more meaningful endorsement. If you're not from here, you may not know this, but no one knows Michigan like Debbie Stabenow.
Not only was Senator Stabenow the first woman elected to the U.S. Senate from Michigan, she is also one of the most respected leaders our state has ever seen.
She spent five decades serving Michiganders in elected office and met every challenge with grit, competence, and a deep understanding of the people who call this state home.
She unapologetically fought for Michigan manufacturing. She stood up for our farmers. She protected the Great Lakes and our clean water.
She knew how to get things done. She delivered results, and she did it without ever losing sight of the people behind the policies.
That's why I admire her so much, and why I'm so grateful for her support.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/86ea7190-9112-4adf-8be6-abd1fe02149f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I've known Senator Stabenow since we worked together during President Obama's auto rescue, when we helped save more than 200,000 Michigan jobs. She understood what that moment meant for our state. She understood that the auto industry is not just a line item in an economic report - it is families, communities, and generations of Michigan pride.
She has always understood the Michigan way.
That's why I was so moved by what she said when she endorsed me: **" Haley has the track record and the Michigan grit to lower costs and get things done for Michigan families."**
That means a lot coming from Debbie Stabenow. Because she knows what it takes to fight - and she knows what it takes to win.
Senator Stabenow understands that the stakes are high in this battleground race. Senate control could come down to Michigan, and the polls consistently show I'm the Democrat with the best chance at defeating Mike Rogers.
Friend, this is not just another election. This is a turning point for our state. Costs are too high. Working families are struggling. And Republicans are focused on pleasing Trump and their MAGA billionaire donors - while doing next to nothing to help regular folks who can't afford the basics.
This is a serious moment, and it requires serious leaders.
**To have Senator Stabenow say she believes I 'm ready for this work - ready to continue her fight, ready to deliver for families, ready to meet this moment - is incredibly humbling.**
And motivating.
Because I believe in the same kind of politics she practiced: one rooted in service, in results, and in never forgetting the Michiganders who sent you there in the first place.
I'm not running for Senate to make speeches or go viral. I'm running to fight for this state I love.
To lower costs.
To create jobs.
To protect manufacturing.
To stand up for workers.
To make government work for all Michiganders, not just the wealthy and well-connected.
That is the work. And Debbie Stabenow has been one of Michigan's greatest examples of how to do it.
**So yes, I am so proud of this endorsement. But more than that, I am grateful for her example. For her trust. For the path she helped pave. And I 'm more fired up than ever to win.**
If you're in a position to chip in, I'd be grateful for that too. Truly. We're building a grassroots campaign, so every dollar helps. **[Will you help us take on Mike Rogers and keep Michigan blue?](https://substack.com/redirect/86ea7190-9112-4adf-8be6-abd1fe02149f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Donate](https://substack.com/redirect/86ea7190-9112-4adf-8be6-abd1fe02149f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Thank you, Senator Stabenow. We won't let you down.
With grit and gratitude,
Haley

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in today?
[Donate](https://substack.com/redirect/86ea7190-9112-4adf-8be6-abd1fe02149f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### Paid for by Haley Stevens for Michigan.

name: Voter Action Project
subject: The Senate is holding the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We must stop these suppressive bills in the Senate, because the opponents of voting rights in the House keep trying to check these voter suppression bills off their to-do list.
Why? Listen to Senator Richard Blumenthal of Connecticut:
(Image of Richard Blumenthal speaking on the Senate floor) [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SAVE_RB.jpg]
RUSH $35 or more right now to stop these bills, defend our right to vote, and stop opponents of voting rights from destroying our democracy >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=050626_3&amount=35]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
After the House passed the SAVE America Act ( the latest version of the anti-voting SAVE Act ), the Senate is all we have left to stop this suppressive legislation from becoming law ahead of the midterm elections , folks.
Defenders of voting rights know that non-citizen voting is already illegal, extremely rare, and that this bill is written in a way that could disenfranchise millions of eligible women across the country. Here's Colorado Senator Michael Bennet on the impact of these bills:
(Image of Michael Bennet speaking on the Senate floor) [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SAVE_MB.jpg]
Opponents of voting rights in Congress -- and in the White House -- favor this bill because they know it could suppress millions of eligible voters, changing the composition of the electorate and potentially empowering them and their party for years to come.
Please, Team, join these brave Senators today. Fuel our efforts to stop this dangerous legislation with $35 or whatever you can and ensure millions of women's voices continue to be heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=050626_3&amount=35]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

We know the SAVE America Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights to be in place before November, folks. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law.
This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register, either a passport or a birth certificate that matches their current first and last name -- something millions of eligible American women don’t have. And that’s the point.
The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise anywhere from 11 million to 65 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”
The consequences of a bill like this passing would be simply catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $35 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE America Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=050626_3&amount=35]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=050626_3&amount=20]

name: Rachel Campbell, Chair
subject: 🚨8:30 AM at the Capitol.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party
body:
This is a defining moment in history. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130889570/619268993/-1614139448?Refcode=260506-email-dcs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWIwNmIzNi1hYTQ5LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SFLdHrP1bdfG8v-hVNt9tTMFZxv9UskE2S5xQL8Z6JM=)
---
Friend, **This is a defining moment in history.** First thing in the morning, Tennessee Republicans will take their final floor votes to maliciously redraw our congressional district maps. **Let me say it plainly: This is an unfair power grab designed to divide our communities, and it is their final step to suppress our vote.** They know they don't have the popular support to win a free and fair election, so they are cheating. They are rushing this through because they are terrified of the organizing power we have built across all 95 counties, and they want to silence the Black and brown Tennesseans who resist them. We refuse to let them do this in the dark. **We need every available person at the State Capitol Rotunda TOMORROW at 8:30 AM CT.** This is one of your last chances to show up and make your voice heard before they gavel in. Meet us at the Rotunda, pack the galleries, and show them we are not backing down. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130889571/619268994/-2050380268?Refcode=260506-email-dcs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWIwNmIzNi1hYTQ5LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SFLdHrP1bdfG8v-hVNt9tTMFZxv9UskE2S5xQL8Z6JM=&emci=d79b7636-a849-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=25b06b36-aa49-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=6362892) | [RSVP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130889572/619268995/1557169752?Refcode=260506-email-dcs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWIwNmIzNi1hYTQ5LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SFLdHrP1bdfG8v-hVNt9tTMFZxv9UskE2S5xQL8Z6JM=&emci=d79b7636-a849-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=25b06b36-aa49-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=6362892)
---
If you cannot be there in person, we still urgently need your help. Because the legislature is officially in session, our Democratic lawmakers are legally banned from fundraising. Their hands are tied while they fight on the floor, so they are relying entirely on the state party and grassroots donors to fund the legal and organizing battle ahead.
**[If you cannot march with us at 8:30 AM, will you rush an emergency contribution of $10 or $25 to help us defend Memphis and fight back against this racist gerrymander?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130889573/619268996/-1270985636?refcode=260506-email&Refcode=260506-email-dcs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWIwNmIzNi1hYTQ5LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SFLdHrP1bdfG8v-hVNt9tTMFZxv9UskE2S5xQL8Z6JM=)**
[RUSH A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130889574/619268997/-1270985636?refcode=260506-email&Refcode=260506-email-dcs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWIwNmIzNi1hYTQ5LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SFLdHrP1bdfG8v-hVNt9tTMFZxv9UskE2S5xQL8Z6JM=)
---
Their cruelty stops with us. See you at the Capitol.
Rachel Campbell
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
Tennessee Democratic Party
4900 Centennial Blvd, Suite 300
Nashville, TN 37209
United States **[tndp.org](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130889575/619268998/-1458193909?Refcode=260506-email-dcs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWIwNmIzNi1hYTQ5LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SFLdHrP1bdfG8v-hVNt9tTMFZxv9UskE2S5xQL8Z6JM=&emci=d79b7636-a849-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=25b06b36-aa49-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=6362892) | [info@tndp.org](mailto:info@tndp.org)** | Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party

Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to touch base with key supporters.

Right now, we’re heading into an important stretch, and the truth is simple:

**The Senate Majority is on the line.**

If we want to keep moving our priorities forward, we need to hold onto the Senate Majority.

**There are SIX key Senate races that will decide the outcome.**

_Iowa.
Maine.
Ohio.
Alaska.
North Carolina.
Michigan._

Each one matters.

| [**ONE DONATION >> SUPPORT SIX SENATE RACES**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/dpXNE_BXj0akN6Qv0Fph_21ealiyiy2HmahCuoIwexapxBiECHpt5BjwkP-Om28nAM42KXdsHsa0VRyPWqL6HeSVGdcXbaMysnESUGq2dkXY_LR8SC4rXJ2cbhsUJTTnbxfCqGtwLSFtm_oHV4rzRbAbexW6zu_At1R4TuZ9WS5VvHBpZHOdbRAsbSS_oGMh3fX_vdWB9o5Luf7aHiLT_EmixffSASlT18wlrQ2fYc4grRdyOCekMBYph1tNOaLdFH3lzvt2n-SvtgYoENH7lRhRSqx41YMkpysarlA9MKKujliqGhRXXmnO9ZOMlfUjOkGoCZaBLnoMmHaxAqXLfa8haIP_Xhx-tdqRhXY_iQl9pNHLA94Vxdz92-uFa8TT_wfnu7rEh11Chp9Nimv-H2ZWN47ixGHdf6tgXlLiJMwnQ3IIJDCBBE1M_qDZ7Za_rnutKdpPAszotcul61bNLlNOCcnnxcnfLtj5HPES0YP2fCZ7sIRj6PNBFxaDdjX83KyFEr8REHskBu5rInxlDB8cwnyiuHYlnk87H9wp800hSC27wkVI3Dqplc5Ph5NzwhSCLWwhWpIrvD1NnRbRnw33ZFNnP5kQ6tMcz-rBmpeuE2Alpq6rgify80LNYrgTGogaO_lJJPAuWGa_9E4RGn4WuvPwMpP307jlZzaYIc1vH8vc0T_P11_PTs2FHJ2GVA9wLwTUq1NiSpj3WMwLuNwGDEG4lFllaXuUj9uzd5JwiljZAq90qDNBniKg4qUnBLKUQCSQoUOmAEc6bkBjLJNTRVlMGmRwWEakbiJOYU8RgHZWe0KL1yRXw-P2QiC_7WVEnQ8/a19xSplhxi0HSaOwEFVz2Z2GoWvKeAZx/20)
---

That’s why I’m asking for your help to make sure these campaigns have what they need to compete and reach voters.

For a limited time, support is being shared across all six races to help strengthen our efforts where it counts most.

[**ONE DONATION >> SUPPORT SIX SENATE RACES**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/HYBRVoCVR0ihO5k9XkiK34ZSKatpHOv6ENHXkIVa4lthGbWI6NV6Vckw3gO54ztRwGi092NRP6On2DJrZuiIVxtRhDPcaUmR4ytNj8u6rQpZtzf9xCzAmQ3vSMg5_kdJFNb9soqFQqoG1j0G6zL_Ppq_u-2xsC1-KsPWwS_rKoepas0jf7TGJjEISFiF9PoHWGo5bL5pFYSlYgvetlYRzcoGM3wGoaG1YE0zkIVJcyoMFL9yYnkmGEVB9aDojIbocB1iR6UnzGjI4IQsUO-YRwBJ2GeoiV_CIYwv5v0hckrCmlza6w5YpPSbgVAhBPjOirjDqpJwNWo-VY1GDEu3lX7QRfuW3Tj4j1boUBY4Enyt7QdOxSAVMl5TZWD2A0Ir5eZcKSMYnFxjXx5Oo5_5RVaed7NJMz5TQjjcHm24jiIOYmERBSPURFHLJ483TeeX7R2M7MerjEh6NAHd0mQsDbiriYTb-SFRBRpDZW4YAVpcLul_39lHcmTbyfA1BTM91TY8_-U1jmyIKDklkjt_PIm2LbZ5svIusELOOnEtliIvdgcp71RR8gQqqydCxZP6MKfB8VSTrqK6ydnEC5rYJ6Q6sOhQCNBJfNHoPzSBQZCFMfwwWIznZCCQvuPw9xgOIXPveemnaEgNUdGvEgRTYKC8USjQGVIDJ1EvAnkjN-RbqHXU1IojQ8AEIZZDihvROjXIi2Ff3aGcmuZmERNxTHA5wdYIb2fk8c2B2nVMonf_DnMBIaSdZLFQ4mzjHSZkGkJPEXiXyrXHuCxqmM5sAz3ehBd21id7umlzjwTSGbQnEnBM7wGbA1KMM3NLPkbcq6_vd-s/QbvIPIDS9xWv1Sc48P_nqXQdy-Z-QyU5/20)

name: John James
subject: I’m being sued.

name: Dan Cox
subject: Opened your electric bill yet?
body:
Maryland families are paying more—and it’s fixable.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/coxforcongress/something-happened-this-week-6754375?e=5bb5efcda7)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | |

,
Maryland families are paying some of the highest electric bills in our region—and it didn’t have to be this way.
While states like Virginia and West Virginia continue to produce more of their own power, Maryland has become increasingly dependent on energy from outside the state. At the same time, demand is rising fast, especially with the growth of data centers across the PJM grid.
The result? **Higher costs for you.**
And it’s about to get worse.
More in-state power plants are scheduled to shut down in the coming years, which means even less local supply and even more pressure on prices.
We don’t need to accept that.
I have a plan to bring costs down and restore energy stability in Maryland:
* Bring reliable power generation back online where possible
* Expand cleaner natural gas capacity and modernize existing infrastructure
* Advance small modular nuclear reactors (SMRs)
* Require large-scale energy users, like data centers, to carry more of their own load

This is about one thing: **lowering your electric bill and protecting Maryland families from rising costs.**
If you’re ready for a different direction, **join me today at**[**DanCoxforGovernor.com**](https://us.list-manage.com/tQK64djys5B?e=5bb5efcda7&c2id=56a77d5a7be3731f6f21d9e4cc6a323b)
I’d be honored to earn your vote.

---
| [Invest in Your Future Today](https://us.list-manage.com/yzVek7Nj255?e=5bb5efcda7&c2id=56a77d5a7be3731f6f21d9e4cc6a323b)
---
| |
Dan CoxRepublican Candidate for Governor of Maryland
P.S. Early mail-in ballots will be requested in just a few weeks. [Your support today helps us reach those voters before they cast their ballots.](https://us.list-manage.com/XeOztaRCnLG?e=5bb5efcda7&c2id=56a77d5a7be3731f6f21d9e4cc6a323b)

The only way we’ll have the resources to win

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130889777/619276606/-1473932214?refcode=logo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzZkODRlNC1hYjQ5LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DQbUApo658MJ_IN8KnHQ_fzbDL2KZhhojJpqxA5GcOw=) John Hickenlooper here. I hate sending emails asking you for money. Believe me – I’d much rather be talking to you in person about the work we've done, ideally over coffee or a fresh Colorado beer. But the reality is these messages are non-negotiable for our campaign (and trust me, I’ve all-but begged my finance team for other options). Let me explain: We don't take money from corporate PACs. I’m in the Senate to serve you and your family, not corporations who might want to cut a check for political favors. But that means our campaign is powered by committed supporters like you generously giving whatever they can, whenever they can – even if it’s $1, $5, or $10 at a time. subject: Biden let them in. We're sending them home.

Fellow American,

People forget.

They forget what Biden and the Democrats did to this country.

**Over four years, they threw open the southern border and let more than 20 million illegal immigrants pour into our communities.** Twenty. Million. People. Who came here illegally, on our dime, while American families struggled to pay rent, find jobs, and keep their kids safe.

They let it happen. They encouraged it. And then they had the nerve to call us heartless for wanting it to stop.

[**CONTINUE DEPORTATIONS**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=2f0b706a14f84557aa501b89834ad50c&_e=wLjrf5CinvmEHR36bw6yNFylPF9x7mP7jHyzl3OLgoqeg-Vj7-81QQwEUMGdBu8m3etxO7QmKItLDgP6QKr5-3It7a9ApDy78xBB93zBGpt-QUv0a6QNOONyrIGmDPae6eBlweL4Hb-C7d8imjdi1ycrdDgtc2oHpCARah0uCgx0eMVNSTZ7gaabKoM1L2Kqz3eMbIWvX9hTYuG8MnCA4hU5KYDaXY-w7MW3aUoeYWu6913wWJg_rkI3IhFA2RduDvHWBjxpWlArgjB4G1KUNTRUVdm9OBE_3a33yDWhpOv2Qiagr3HyYtbVpQddkDZuYmk6xs75qmIJjBE6OAUaXUgN9dR4zqdiR50kQB8it1It4NLwdQ8wG4Fpt5DfhvDQs3v_Q2y-TsmL_HFIdGh_N1e8IRePvLIaxSBtWnS9K1Nojrrj4rKpoe1y9GsDQKlupXmwTy9-QitDET5e39w-0dxwFIg0sZiX9S86Z9UWf6mo6aTl3wfxi5TQ-5udS-I1Ab1AEZ_RqsQ5s82UnvIjQP2KGPRH5dMlPxfF91oY_fsfDs3kUnYq0bfa_SkMmLhH7K34iqU8tF1TL-o-SgPobCNucvbxQHbEO2WSe2Y6ETj7IlLWuoKBSm0RjvjmUjFVkzqeWYlycpC1yepkJMJQX_Wrgu46Smaa63ERGv7Br35ioCgHbDgczZsM4cLfAH2Ad9AWbm_JQypR3yhIvLdEB8KM6rIGo5fX0DueoOFyIP2dC1JpVXXkLqXeZlispcy6KzbjKtayBW-eij5mqxr5rw%3D%3D)
Well, it stopped.

Since President Trump returned to office, we've deported millions of illegal immigrants. The border is LOCKED DOWN. The message is getting through: America is not a free pass.

[**But the job is not done.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=2f0b706a14f84557aa501b89834ad50c&_e=wLjrf5CinvmEHR36bw6yNFylPF9x7mP7jHyzl3OLgoqeg-Vj7-81QQwEUMGdBu8m3etxO7QmKItLDgP6QKr5-3It7a9ApDy78xBB93zBGpt-QUv0a6QNOONyrIGmDPae6eBlweL4Hb-C7d8imjdi1ycrdDgtc2oHpCARah0uCgx0eMVNSTZ7gaabKoM1L2Kqz3eMbIWvX9hTYuG8MnCA4hU5KYDaXY-w7MW3aUoeYWu6913wWJg_rkI3IhFA2RduDvHWBjxpWlArgjB4G1KUNWyTxKliY6LgefFeP0-Ofa1-cHYGom_Sslmrn5-QJCf9UoXdybS3PvBzrWCXlqw2USR9NTD-PulJAI6LP2EBo4h0T5tFU7JE-a9h_-Ny2HEmH3MtAod7v6PCO261y5eVakIKM11YCwjW3Z1Y91QUwDH_TiV11ZFVKzfkey9r07MlvcKA4TDXgG3Ww679AKMvl7qOT0aouBcoPGfKsPv1qH2IbkM-Y24P3LfDIRB9A98ebFueJ-4sl704YKrXJu0k2AMvGde5OdM3AlcyMPDzalhmEnkrjJxdbGbzzlDly1UVSWm6b0EgRr7PzKBmVH454m9ylyhY5JIcQwdf4D6XQx5JfWu_BBNKPLQ5MbHLF4QXBx1hgVzkYyd8J2jTPYv2h0jsRbgKVt0Rt1DAYnmBOet1amdwlIQDE198tsE2LoOe_l5893YnTD3YlEfzQCgMFiT225nkdcZWFeMxu2yEzXlrQPEJLcsiNo3Ae0lZC60cUtosV3F_T0vRChWIOwolAQ%3D%3D)

Millions more need to go. And the open-borders Left is fighting us every step of the way — in Congress, in the courts, in the press. They want to slow this down. Reverse it. Pretend the last four years never happened.

I won't let them.

[**I've been on the front lines of this fight. I've voted to fund deportations, secure the border, and empower the administration to finish what we started. clean_body: Over four years, they threw open the southern border and let more than 20 million illegal immigrants pour into our communities. | Fellow American, People forget. They forget what Biden and the Democrats did to this country. Over four years, they threw open the southern border and let more than 20 million illegal immigrants pour into our communities. Twenty. Million. People. Who came here illegally, on our dime, while American families struggled to pay rent, find jobs, and keep their kids safe. They let it happen. They encouraged it. And then they had the nerve to call us heartless for wanting it to stop. Well, it stopped. Since President Trump returned to office, we've deported millions of illegal immigrants. The border is LOCKED DOWN. The message is getting through: America is not a free pass. Millions more need to go. And the open-borders Left is fighting us every step of the way — in Congress, in the courts, in the press. They want to slow this down. Reverse it. Pretend the last four years never happened. I won't let them. The American people didn't forget. And together, we're going to finish this. For Texas, Beth Van Duyne | | PAID FOR BY BETH VAN DUYNE FOR CONGRESS

Peter, This fight isn’t about a new flag or a few extra stars. It’s about power — **_and who gets to keep it._** The same Washington insiders who ignore middle America every day are now pushing to make D.C. a state. **_Why?_** Because it means _more_ votes for them, _less_ voice for you. They call it **_“democracy.”_** But what it really means is turning the nation’s capital into a fortress —** _one they’ll control_** _**_forever_**_** _._** They want to change the rules so they never have to answer to voters like you again, Peter. Senator Katie Britt is one of the few standing up to say _enough._ [**_She’s defending our Constitution, fighting for fairness, and protecting the voice of every American who’s tired of being shut out by Washington elites._**](https://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=f994ee2e749348a5a573a3521ef8e084&_e=co0_Hitc24vyHYkw8hJcMJVA5unC2MNpK0ACUeUbr6sNf8CrDU5R3yTeT3pTALDlMwd4d3DBFntBZoUr5FqngO85eXywouZ3xKTUR1SWDg6crqiZ9qaCoE5sABXMDsF6z9Zf9Sis237hL7dbzYOT5Co7t2D5gN95wviedbtHCGywkUU_qM8-NwJ8aWRvwCFN1yICWXC6MPEbLvxxYp7PQND1g5WVUMq0adNGsFXnWdorK2N9ef_trlWO3aHvaomYYKSY54lor5CXRPZ9SQZbzBh-Wc8ifHjAfDzuz-te9rPd5J6nGsg4rj5DJI1vQAEm3Nx127wMnW0KIvZVJ6jW-nKmEWXdIIUUjVzEoTT2oa4HkIsj5AFRBdYwZlNXV5CfCZWWSHOzhKgYF6hSb33ckKqyBB8me9Ieo4O9_9JT0y7xzczwIkFgDe1zUF3jcOLhisUEa7_724I7ihlmACpyepyTjDPzILU4Lpdm96OGViwiBBAOm78gdkU6LJiwH-m59O1LmRPvp5YKFgUAg5t8QK7730JLcM3hfqxQ8d_4Xj5Uy3cMG3DNZHETcIPanwlb8pEfSiyrKEQR9tyxHk_eqX3tbU7mLlwfXPiTGssXb4zqSlj7fw-vj5-jH7XMqekMvm0CDUxS20918-cs6luZee_ZIpbIfI8FPu0xhc-U50uD0VNnehQA9N_0xxbCQZmYWBRbSPrDs1QEeUTOU9CzLL6QHXob8xMzgmoqd9WdAt_HgKjwh3G6nNUIowg--b7HWqUtcQpucJ6qWlVG6yxUDGHmj7--R6kHNEUwFVAo0NWG7WaiG_t6LiPSWiEwNoF-adZQ2XNliJDE5DZrfxF2IZ1f1Q9A-kxa94i82jPrnDjOZ3GtbqryPY1chstCBKg8zWAIoO5Em6qcfx_Kprwu2br3vCoSnFj1eNodAvwKjitDcCSc2fMnDW_xrFzFTy4YNHB3PLHfxJy-Pr67-MT4T9NyYs84cxtKby5whuqeSwA%3D)

name: James Carville
subject: The stakes couldn’t be higher.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/75562F6666466C487461444F4457705833526B7456693474564B36734A6F5061574E65434E4D35712B554A47547457644C6E4D3177765244444D664E34727249/editor_images/Screen%20Shot%202026-02-26%20at%209.05.09%20AM.png]
Last year, Pete Hegseth shamelessly removed Nancy Lacore from her position as Chief of Navy Reserve.
She was a three-star vice admiral with thirty-five years of service and thousands of sailors under her command, but they just showed her to the door for NO REASON.
That tells you everything you need to know about Republicans’ hare-brained leadership. Experience and integrity don’t matter if you don’t fall in line.
But everyday folks are tired of this chaos. They’re exhausted by the noise. And they’re FED UP with Republican leaders who prioritize pageantry over delivering real results.
Luckily, Nancy’s running for Congress to restore honor, integrity, and commitment.
She’s the leader we deserve – we NEED – in South Carolina’s First District. And if you’re serious about flipping the House and restoring integrity in Congress, will you split $25 to support Nancy’s campaign and Resist Reclaim Rebuild? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
DONATE NOW TO HELP NANCY FLIP THIS SEAT! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
Pete Hegseth made a massive mistake in removing Nancy Lacore.
And it’s going to backfire – BIG TIME.
Because SC-01 will be one of the most competitive battlegrounds in the country this cycle. This race could easily decide control of Congress.
Luckily, Nancy isn’t the type to back down from a challenge.
She has the grit, discipline, and credibility to not only win this race but deliver for South Carolina.
And Republicans are going to throw serious money into this race for that reason. That’s why grassroots support matters so much. The stakes couldn’t be higher.
So, I’ll ask again: will you split a donation of $25, $50, or whatever you can spare between Resist Reclaim Rebuild and Nancy’s campaign to help them flip this must-win seat and help take back the House? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
CHIP IN TO DEFEAT PETE HEGSETH'S ROTTEN SCHEME! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
They tried to push her out. Let’s send her to Congress instead.
– James Carville

| | Folks, Jeff Crank is staying quiet to stay in Donald Trump’s good graces. Because he’s seen what happens when Republicans step out of line. Just look at what happened to Jeff Hurd in Grand Junction. He pushed back once, and Trump ripped away his endorsement overnight. It took weeks of political groveling to win it back. That’s the reality of today’s Republican Party: Step out of line, and you pay the price.**So Crank stays quiet. Goes along. Doesn’t rock the boat.** But that’s cowardice, not leadership. clean_body: | | | | | Folks, Jeff Crank is staying quiet to stay in Donald Trump’s good graces. Because he’s seen what happens when Republicans step out of line. Just look at what happened to Jeff Hurd in Grand Junction. He pushed back once, and Trump ripped away his endorsement overnight. It took weeks of political groveling to win it back. That’s the reality of today’s Republican Party: Step out of line, and you pay the price.So Crank stays quiet. Goes along. Doesn’t rock the boat. But that’s cowardice, not leadership. I’m running because I’ve spent my life doing exactly that — serving, leading, and speaking up when it matters, whether in uniform or in our community. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | | | Campaigns like ours don’t win on words alone — they win because people step up in moments like this. — Joe | | | Joe Reagan is a Democrat, decorated combat Veteran, nonprofit leader, and devoted father running for Congress to flip Colorado’s 5th District blue. With over 20+ years of experience leading change and teams across the defense, technology, and nonprofit sectors, Joe Reagan is ready to step up and bring the concerns of our community to Congress. Support Joe’s campaign to help launch a new era of leadership in Washington D.C. »** | | FOLLOW JOE ONLINE: | | ---|--- Paid for by the Committee to Elect Joe Reagan

name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: I need all the help I can get.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McMorrow for Michigan
body:
# [](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/685?refcode=&t=1&akid=4651%2E898137%2Epxv762)
In the last few weeks, the Trump campaign, the Heritage Foundation, and even _Ted Cruz_ have attacked me and my campaign.
**That means they see us as a threat. Good — they should.**
Polls show I’m the best candidate to take on Mike Rogers. I’ve grown the most in the polls since we launched last year. The momentum we have is real.
_Now, we need to capitalize on the moment, fight back against the GOP attacks, and win this race._
I’m not accepting a cent of corporate PAC money. But between these attacks, right-wing ads running against me, and more than $45 million in super PAC money pouring into Michigan to prop up Rogers’ campaign, I need your help.
[**Can you donate $10 to help us fight back against people like Ted Cruz and, more importantly, win this race?**](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/6413?amount=10&t=2&akid=4651%2E898137%2Epxv762)

name: Chris Pappas
subject: 6 months from now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
We’re officially entering the most important, most expensive, and most competitive stretch of this race.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=6512%2E582294%2EKs-EJ6)
Team,
**This week marks six months until Election Day.**
That means we’re officially entering the most important, most expensive, and most competitive stretch of this race.
**Six months** to organize across every corner of the state.
**Six months** to get in front of undecided voters.
**Six months** to make sure our message is heard over everything else coming at people this cycle.
Chris’s mission is clear: bringing down costs for working families, strengthening our economy, protecting access to affordable, quality health care, and making sure people can afford to build a life.
If we fall behind on resources now, we fall behind _everywhere_ — organizing, advertising, and the ability to reach voters when it matters most.
**[I’m asking you: Will you chip in $6 today — one dollar for every month between now and Election Day — to help power this campaign through the most important fundraising stretch of the entire race?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260506_2.T2rmdf&refcode=em20260506-2&t=2&akid=6512%2E582294%2EKs-EJ6)**
**[Donate »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260506_2.T2rmdf&refcode=em20260506-2&t=3&akid=6512%2E582294%2EKs-EJ6)**
Every dollar we raise right now matters. It determines how many voters we can reach, how strong our organizing program is, and whether we have what it takes to compete all the way through November.
**[We’ve got six months to go. Let’s make them count. Chip in $6, $5, or whatever you can today to boost our campaign and keep NH blue.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260506_2.T2rmdf&refcode=em20260506-2&t=4&akid=6512%2E582294%2EKs-EJ6)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260506_2.T2rmdf&amount=5&refcode=em20260506-2&t=23&akid=6512%2E582294%2EKs-EJ6)**
Onward,
Chris
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20260506-2&t=24&refcode2=6512_582294_Ks-EJ6&akid=6512%2E582294%2EKs-EJ6)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: The Rotten Tomato Report  [via Blue Amp Action]
subject: A rotten tomato for Trump 🍅
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
| Republicans in Congress keep enabling Trump. Let’s defeat their slim majority.
---
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=1&akid=2204%2E259176%2E0qpwn6)_

[](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11950?t=2&akid=2204%2E259176%2E0qpwn6) Peter, Trump wants credit for everything happening right now. So fine. Let’s give him credit. Not a gold star. name: CADEM HQ
subject: Less than 4 weeks until California’s make-or-break primary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Friend,
We are officially LESS THAN FOUR WEEKS away from California’s critical Primary Election.
And sadly, we need to sound the alarm: A recent poll in CA-48 suggests Republicans could outflank Democrats and potentially lock us out of the General Election entirely.
If that happens, Democrats would be shut out of one of the most competitive swing U.S. House seats in America before the General Election even begins.
We have a plan to fight back. We’ll give you all the details, but we need to raise another $8,000 before midnight tonight to make it happen. Please, will you rush a donation right now? If you aren’t sure, read on to hear how we will invest your generous donation. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may26?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may26?&refcode=&amount=]Our organizing teams here at the California Democratic Party are rapidly scaling up outreach operations across battleground districts right now. We’ve launched Spanish-language phonebanks, expanded voter outreach, and we’re ramping up voter protection efforts ahead of the primary.
But these final weeks are expensive. And Republicans and their dark money allies are already flooding key districts with attack ads and misinformation.
Your donation today will help fund our GOTV and persuasion plans, which include:
➡️ Spanish-language phonebanks;
➡️ Voter protection programs, poll monitoring, and multilingual voter hotlines;
➡️ Door-to-door canvasses and neighborhood walks;
➡️ Grassroots organizing in battleground districts like CA-48.
Simply put, the next four weeks could determine whether Democrats even have a chance to compete for the House Majority in November.
Please rush a donation right now to help us fight back before it’s too late >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may26?&refcode=&amount=]

clean_body: [] Friend, We are officially LESS THAN FOUR WEEKS away from California’s critical Primary Election. And sadly, we need to sound the alarm: A recent poll in CA-48 suggests Republicans could outflank Democrats and potentially lock us out of the General Election entirely. If that happens, Democrats would be shut out of one of the most competitive swing U.S. House seats in America before the General Election even begins. We have a plan to fight back. We’ll give you all the details, but we need to raise another $8,000 before midnight tonight to make it happen. Please, will you rush a donation right now? If you aren’t sure, read on to hear how we will invest your generous donation. [=] CHIP IN $ >> [ organizing teams here at the California Democratic Party are rapidly scaling up outreach operations across battleground districts right now. We’ve launched Spanish-language phonebanks, expanded voter outreach, and we’re ramping up voter protection efforts ahead of the primary. But these final weeks are expensive. And Republicans and their dark money allies are already flooding key districts with attack ads and misinformation. Your donation today will help fund our GOTV and persuasion plans, which include: ➡️ Spanish-language phonebanks; ➡️ Voter protection programs, poll monitoring, and multilingual voter hotlines; ➡️ Door-to-door canvasses and neighborhood walks; ➡️ Grassroots organizing in battleground districts like CA-48. Simply put, the next four weeks could determine whether Democrats even have a chance to compete for the House Majority in November. Please rush a donation right now to help us fight back before it’s too late >> [=] CHIP IN $ >> [=] CHIP IN $ >> [=] CHIP IN $ >> [=] CHIP IN $ >> [=] CHIP IN $ >> [ you, - The California Democratic Party DONATE » [] Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. body:
But I need you to understand the stakes of our midnight deadline.
These emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. If you'd prefer to unsubscribe, [click here](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/7010?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.06_Sorry_B1_F1_S1_C1_30DO30DC_N-T0&t=1&akid=6124%2E196590%2EPP9VZY).
---
| [**_I hate to reach out so late, but this couldn’t wait. I am $3,339 short of my midnight fundraising goal, and if we fall short, Trump’s handpicked Wisconsin Governor’s candidate gets one step closer to greenlighting the MAGA agenda across the Badger state. Will you chip in now to help us hit our goal and keep Wisconsin blue?_**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/7008?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.06_Sorry_B1_F1_S1_C1_30DO30DC_N-T0&t=4&akid=6124%2E196590%2EPP9VZY) | | [ CHIP IN NOW >> ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/7008?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.06_Sorry_B1_F1_S1_C1_30DO30DC_N-T0&t=5&akid=6124%2E196590%2EPP9VZY)
---
**I need you to understand the stakes of our midnight deadline.**

Healthcare, reproductive rights, LGBTQ+ rights, voting rights, and so much more are at stake in Wisconsin.

Trump’s handpicked candidate is ready to greenlight Trump’s MAGA agenda, which throws all of those issues out the window. Making matters worse, Trump’s MAGA billionaire buddies are preparing to funnel millions to defeat my campaign.

I’m fighting like hell to put in the miles we need to win this race. We’re knocking on doors, making phone calls, and raising as much money as we can to compete against Trump’s hand-picked candidate, Tom Tiffany.

But without support from folks like you, we will fall short. _No jokes, no lies – that’s the truth._

[**_So please, will you chip in $25 to ensure we raise the $3,339 we need to beat Trump’s handpicked candidate this November?_**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/7342?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.06_Sorry_B1_F1_S1_C1_30DO30DC_N-T0&t=6&akid=6124%2E196590%2EPP9VZY)

– Mandela

name: Rob Bonta
subject: This is reckless — and we're fighting back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26]
For nearly a century, federal law has prohibited the unregulated shipment of handguns through the United States Postal Service to protect public safety.
But the Trump administration has decided they don’t think the law should apply anymore — and then directed USPS to make up their own policy to allow anyone to mail handguns across and within state lines, without the involvement of a firearm dealer.
Once again, the Trump administration is disregarding the safety of the people it is sworn to serve. We cannot and will not ignore the dangerous consequences of this proposed rule that puts our communities at risk.
It’s reckless and illegal – and we’re fighting back. Will you chip in to help power this work? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?amount=50]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?amount=50]
This administration cannot just unilaterally tell the USPS to violate a valid federal law — so I co-led a coalition of 22 attorneys general in submitting a formal comment letter making clear that the proposed new rule is unlawful and would make our communities less safe.
Under the Trump administration’s preferred policy, people who are legally prohibited from owning a firearm — like felons and domestic abusers — could have a handgun shipped directly through the mail, bypassing safeguards that exist to keep weapons out of dangerous hands.
And at a time when budgets are already under pressure, this rule would make it even harder and more expensive for law enforcement to trace illegal firearms and solve gun crimes.
The Trump administration has made clear it will dismantle gun safety laws piece by piece if no one pushes back. We are pushing back — and we need your support to keep doing it.
Please pitch in $25, $50, or whatever you can today: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?amount=50]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?express_lane=true&amount=25] DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?express_lane=true&amount=100] DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?express_lane=true&amount=250]
DONATE $500 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?express_lane=true&amount=500] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26]
This fight is ongoing, and I’ll be sure to keep you updated every step of the way. But until then, thank you for standing up for the rule of law, and helping keep our communities safe.
—Rob
Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California

name: Katie Porter
subject: After tonight’s debate, there’s one thing I want people to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41284%2E3422442%2E4o1gok)
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260506_3_ak.Fo_TcN&refcode=em20260506-41284&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41284%2E3422442%2E4o1gok)
Peter,
I just got off the debate stage, and if there’s one thing I want people to know, it’s this: **this race is about who you think the government should work for.**
Too many people who were up on tonight’s stage are comfortable with the system as it is. _I’m not._
Families in California are doing everything right and _are still falling behind._ Rent is up, groceries are up, wages aren’t keeping pace. And while that’s happening, the people with money and power are doing just fine.
I’ve seen this up close my whole career. And I’ve sat at my kitchen table doing the math, trying to make it work when it doesn’t. That’s not abstract for me. It’s real life for a lot of people.
My agenda is simple: **lower costs, take on the companies and interests driving them up, and hold the government accountable so we can actually deliver for Californians.**
This isn’t about who has the biggest corporations backing them or the most money. It’s about who’s willing to do the work and take on the fights that come with it.
The June primary is less than a month away, ballots are already in mailboxes across the state, and only the top two candidates make it to November.
**[If you’re with me, I’d be honored if you donated $5 or whatever you can to my campaign today. Together, we can build on tonight’s momentum and make sure our message reaches voters across the state.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260506_3_ak.Fo_TcN&refcode=em20260506-41284&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=41284%2E3422442%2E4o1gok)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260506_3_ak.Fo_TcN&refcode=em20260506-41284&t=23&akid=41284%2E3422442%2E4o1gok)
Thank you,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260506-41284&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=41284_3422442_4o1gok&akid=41284%2E3422442%2E4o1gok)**

Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597
clean_body: Peter, I just got off the debate stage, and if there’s one thing I want people to know, it’s this: this race is about who you think the government should work for. Too many people who were up on tonight’s stage are comfortable with the system as it is. I’m not. Families in California are doing everything right and are still falling behind. Rent is up, groceries are up, wages aren’t keeping pace. And while that’s happening, the people with money and power are doing just fine. I’ve seen this up close my whole career. And I’ve sat at my kitchen table doing the math, trying to make it work when it doesn’t. That’s not abstract for me. It’s real life for a lot of people. My agenda is simple: lower costs, take on the companies and interests driving them up, and hold the government accountable so we can actually deliver for Californians. This isn’t about who has the biggest corporations backing them or the most money. It’s about who’s willing to do the work and take on the fights that come with it. The June primary is less than a month away, ballots are already in mailboxes across the state, and only the top two candidates make it to November. Thank you, Katie Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: I'll never accuse you of abandoning us
body:
After all you’ve done for our Party, I salute you!

After all you’ve done for our Party, I salute you, Friend!
| Friend,
---
I’m sick of seeing text messages that accuse you of abandoning the GOP after all you’ve done for us.
---
All because you didn’t give $15 before some random deadline, that’s supposed to mean you **_“betrayed”_** the Republican Party and became a Democrat?
---
So all the times you stood in line to vote, you knocked on doors, you put up a yard sign, you made phone calls, you filled out surveys, you sacrificed your time and money – suddenly, all of that means nothing?
---
**_Give me a break! That’s just insulting._**
---
_Hand to God, I will never stoop to that low._
---
Truth be told, I try not to write too many emails and texts as it is. I’m busy working in Washington to do the job you asked me to do.
---
Honestly, fundraising just isn’t Priority #1.
---
At the end of 2024, I transferred $2.5 MILLION _**away**_ from my own campaign to help conservatives in tough races who _truly_ needed help.
---
**You know what I care about most?** The _ONLY_ thing that WINS elections – **_VOTES_**.
---
_That means registering voters, verifying every Trump voter’s profile, and constantly getting LIVE feedback from voters like you so that the President and I _always_ have the best, most accurate data in the country._
---
That’s how we won in 2024. And it’s my plan to win AGAIN in 2026.
---
[**Please complete the brief questionnaire to verify that YOU are among the highest propensity voters we can count on in the midterms – and then I’ll officially mark you as “verified” in our GOP Voter file for the month.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znh03apndksoq74tqfgihc9rmm7s2javjeg69v8o_rp22sh2s8i6epr0shgm1p71cph2bs)
---

---

**_“Official GOP Voter Verification Questionnaire
Scope: Measuring Voter Propensity” _**

**GOP Voter:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **Survey ID #:** 8337-190
| [VERIFY NOW >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo1iqkod2b8qnrk5k6cncfub64ga0a9k347h09b8_rp22sh2s8i6epr0shgm1p71cph2bs)
---

Thank you,

name: Senator Tom Willis
subject: They Don’t Think West Virginia Will Show Up
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/56c35bf07001/they-dont-think-west-virginia-will-show-up?e=a0285cc040)
---
|
---
| | | | | |

# They Don’t Think West Virginia
# Will Show Up

---
|
---
|
---
| |
Dear Friend,
**West Virginia doesn’t need to be fixed.**
**It needs to be unleashed.**
We have the hardest-working people in America.
Natural resources that power this country.
Communities built on faith, family, and trust.
**What we don’t have is leadership that puts us first.**
That has got to change!
I believe in a simple vision:
**Put West Virginia first.**
Protect our freedoms.
Grow our economy.
Defend our values.
Not Washington’s agenda.
Not outside interests.
Not policies that leave our people behind.
**And the contrast in this race couldn’t be clearer.**
Shelley Moore Capito earned an [**F rating from Liberty Score’s conservative review**](https://tomwillis.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3634ddeac3944e116590ee972&id=96b65a38e2&e=a0285cc040)**.**
According to that scorecard, she voted with the liberal position **57.1% of the time** and aligned with conservative positions only **42.9% of the time.**
And it doesn't end there — she has also received **F ratings for conservative voting from CPAC, FreedomWorks, and Heritage Action.**
**That’s not West Virginia.**
**That’s not our values.****
**But make no mistake — this race is about more than policy.
She has the money.
She has the name recognition.
**She’s been part of the Washington establishment for a quarter century.**
And the establishment is counting on one thing:
**They think this race is already decided.**
They think your vote doesn’t matter.
They think nothing will ever change.
**But they’re wrong.**
This campaign isn’t about the political establishment.**
It’s about you — the good people of West Virginia.**
I’ve beaten the establishment before.
**And with your help, we’ll do it again.**
**When you trust the people and get the government out of the way,****West Virginians always rise.**
This is how we take our state back.
**Vote Tom Willis on May 12.**
**IT’S TIME FOR A CHANGE WV.**
Sincerely,
**Tom Willis**

body:

# Thursday, May 7, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1915, the British ocean liner _Lusitania_ was torpedoed by a German submarine, killing over 1,100 people, including 128 Americans, and bringing the U.S. closer to entering World War I. ([See Video](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D3uozAQQPHTmA5kjD9I4WIbumy7JZpkxmFWjo3MJCi3X2Wv8K-f9Cven-t6Bc5cHr_hSVFSXQudRyYRautehYowZG5QkCALobxaodVo43vteh1WBM6f1XYYE5GhqaM4hjCPdrbBdFt0mGYPt5E80uTcnNyUbs74S3A0AmHH8atpp8OodbDz4Cd3wYAWcfIpjKCsJmSpbfhbuchGKX_qm9pwr88ux01kP9T0S5lFmeU8z2HjQ2r7fLsyi9Sd78c31ZaxP6H1rMySXwcLFIauRdxPzpkPH5TVjydw_m_Lj4a8o_kXAAD__zFMdgw)) If you've ever told your spouse you could watch sports for a living, today might be your chance to prove it. A major American broadcaster is paying [one lucky fan $50,000 to do exactly](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSrCAURL9GMyxEBA0IXmI2L93QYuCidxfBwjvj-PdbM7-waXdVV5_zdZtvFiOm5b_dwFDIc4LziEAEZd4zQSK0EYtNHmwk8PQoCWbBhWK8Z1zP3mK8Zll7EwAEdDWYVuuhlYPUol6NUv3InZMWnAoAUgHnd1Cj63h_H-xYo3mv8Z7rlnMth0Z1_ei1l953KujWVpKDR8ql-c6YaIUQr_yE0ri81dGsRPtRdf8qMVViOs-zCfnVp-tdV2J681RiCvnFViyYFhZsYqcltzJ4QrnYmUv0zD12tn3Snv8wu-8RnSXM6WC0lvxYVobJA_i6GL-fGCMeSleSL5vF-PlCfxL4NOI3AAD__xn2h9k) that for two months this summer. Details below in _Sports_. Is AI harming your brain? We break down the top five ways to protect yourself from the influence of AI. [Listen here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykjzGSrCAQQE8D2VgIaGtA8BOz-emGFNrtyBaChb0z6-23Zq-wB3iv3vu4-3uIKebH_7CT47X4TK8zETNVfxSmzDGkWENGCokJ-atm8lrp_qa6mwKPIabLW4luJdJkJLkWYGjtYEHLzYGxw6xMGDXMi-7WZaEOZpxREyKNQUb3tqlOQasU2KHpTTcioEU0_QptEFYRRi61-Swx80ZrusqTarOUXSa3MR-nMP-EnoSeKs3v2CZdQk9HQfrmGlpZHR6vmFI8exBWPfYQ0y_Pf5p-Ov0TAAD__xCQbDc). Today's sponsor, [American Hartford Gold](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkb1u5CAcxJ8Gd7vC4DVs4SLSxtIVSXulRfwfbE58WBjvKm9_4pI7ndKG8qdhmBl-vkwvxnkXl1cTMBSbpojH7lEK8rSlglic8S6bSDC-gMqRIybBRX_ilxNXExnn36euocECArLB0Cql2053SjTr8KZay7UWxgJao7u-aVhLuPJ-1rhS44bqxi9ctZyrTp97ebmSoo5I9la1hnUc5ErK51_JxbLC-vd0Rz7PKTR-WEvZdiafmBiZGJO1yPvZBGQ3m7iaXGzKtCRPVc_EiGCc_6tkYrQZOC2HIzAxZhSXcXrUsmt1lKOHoT0deQaTt-ePy_1RwvQP4j8YQO4ITN5sjfgJown4ggpyVdXaov9kc4p1cCZvX2J8PGdnEzbjlsjkTfH29c7rwWU8-h9Pz00eaHs4793eK9bxpYb6M1H51r_eB_E7AAD__1N7ugk), helps Americans protect their retirement savings by offering strategies to preserve wealth against inflation and a weakening dollar through investments in physical gold.

## US, Iran Closing In on Peace Memo
The White House said Wednesday it is [closing in on an agreement](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkEGq3DAMQE_j7DQ4jhPnL7KYUkKh_G666DJoYjmj4tjBdiad2xf3CgWt9EDovV-fyyey57D9wJ2m4uIS6MqeSqG0HLFQKIyeEwZL6AvZcqZAi5JqANmDNItF9u9FN3ZyRIq6hqbWmLHVozaqeU7aDLpvexzxsQ7j48ON64N0b5Szqjfj0PBUr8lemlZKo8fb0PUf1lhtbTc406LQkiyXmG6_I4fyJOff8UXptsa98dOzlCOL7i7ULNR8Xddtz6EyoWYKcGah5ipVYUze1vWf1Z-ZXwRnBgwWqiCsPmYOG3CAWIfgwI1gpz1CiUDBwoUJonO8MvoMGd9CzZjgflfq_F6-iW6OK1vRff1Sk9KVf1I6mjTZ42LvOQ9GaLntyP7f8-W_ir8m9TcAAP__5GKWyg) with Iran on a one-page memo that would formally end the 68-day war, with officials expecting Tehran's response within 48 hours. The 14-point framework would trigger [30 days of talks](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOrDAMRb8GuqBgQgJFitfQzWu3RBlshqxCgoIZNH-_yv7CNpalK52rc78e88P54OPrv9vJ8prmSPcZiJnyfCSmyN4Fn11EcoEJ-cqRZpCgheyFNDM6Hz6zqtGuREBdTbY1ZmjVoAzUm30qGOCJuh8GHB0RrTiOWoLWi-wN6NrbQpO9NK2URg2N7voRDSrETq-mdZWShJ5Tbr6Tj7zRGj7pTblZ0l4HuzEfZ9X9q2CqYLrvu1nicylhBVNBVzDJvpzyXacoNuIgt5AoUiJeSyCXxZ6y45T9tTcb76HOFo_bh-BPbSolX7vz4beT_zTU28JPAAAA__-vo3vJ) to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, lift U.S. sanctions, and impose a years-long moratorium on Iranian uranium enrichment. President Trump on Tuesday night [paused Project Freedom](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGu4yAQheGngc4RjDH4FhTbuMu2W1okM8REGBCeJMrbr5JXuPXR-Yr_33k9h5RTuf0NO3mOdS30OjIxU19bZSqcQk49FKSQmZAfvdAKCuygpkG5FUPK79VI9JEIaJTktXOzNrNxIDePAJP9gRG0vSg0zgUAMmO4UIhoNcnkP5qalNNKOTOf7Dj9oEODONrodBBGESau_XSvqfBGMb_rk_rpWneZ_cbcDjH-EbAIWHijLeX82QQsreZ0fQtYkCKVgwQs02wnpWHg_tjb0MLjoGNovd7pykPsRPh9yu6xvVLO6bBOGHXbQ_qqkn-V6enhfwAAAP__Zg18CA), the U.S. naval mission to escort ships through the strait. He warned bombing would resume "at a much higher level" if Iran rejects the deal. Even with talks underway, fighting continued. A U.S. fighter jet [struck an Iranian oil tanker](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2OgzAQBeDTQOdo8A-2CxfbpMu2W6KBGYJXxiDjJMrtV-QKW45Genrf-7kNN4wp5vs3rhzqvA2ZX0fiWrkM-1Y514gpFszEmCpTfZTMgwTZCzAC7EAY03vQLYWZWbJqOXTWuk47bWW7BKXIG7BqNihHI0GhJes6Myov2Y6yjeFMAwO2A7DaXXplPFnSRKqfbYeNBqZYt3L53WKuC8_pvT25XKZtbVNYat2PRn018trIK-4n4HydR6lxStzI6ykQj0PEoyAn8cIipiVmFCu-RS8-HkXQd-hhmojBm8468qN3jrwmcLNqS6D9FVOKR28bDfcVY_qUqP9a7hnkXwAAAP__Kz1_Vw) trying to break the American blockade Wednesday, and Israel hit Beirut for the first time since last month's Hezbollah ceasefire.
## Feds Sue NYT For Race, Gender Bias
The Equal Employment Opportunity Commission sued the _New York Times_ on Tuesday, alleging the paper [bypassed a white male editor for promotion](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQRb_G7rAwYOMtKLZxl223tAgzJPMehggmsfL3T84vvO5IozlX9_6_bBdPifLtn9_RcSxbxqMlZMa6PQpjZvKJqs-APjECP2vGTUk1CzkJaTfwlN6b6cFFRIW6Rzdau4xmMVb1dzeFBWcI0diwgL3KcNVy0qCMNjLEMfbkTpucpB2ltGYZZj39AQsGQM_Rjr4zEoG41OGrUOY7xvQuL6xDKHuf3J350Tr9t1Nrp9bjOIZwbWeL896p9cROrYgliPbEJjIe4l3qt2DasYlTJYBaqLRT9kwlC58S3j54vvbVweOglKjNtjPytntKn3T-1WQvp34CAAD___hDgvk) in favor of a less-qualified woman to meet its race and gender diversity goals. The 11-year veteran editor, who had extensive experience covering real estate, was cut from the final interview panel for the deputy real estate editor opening last year. The role went to an outside candidate the EEOC described as a non-white female with "[little to no experience](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFy6yAQRb9G6tAgQCAXFK9R59em1KzFYm-CwANrK_77jPMLaW9x55zzcV7PQIny9T_s6DmWNePREjJjXe-FMTNBogo5ICTGwI-acVVSWSEnId0agNJrNX3wEVGh7tGPzs2jmY1T_c2DnuQ22Wg1WhtBo7nM0dqL03Cybhx78u83OUk3SunMPFg9nYILJgRtoxuhMxIDcanDZ6HMN4zpVZ5Yh63sffI35nvr9L9OLZ1ajuMYEMs2XMuzU8vbppayd2p5r6I9sImMh3iV-iWYdmwiIImKCRiDqLChgBxEw28RqG2VdsrAVHJffbgflBI16zojrztQ-mXgP4V7evUTAAD__32chLU) in real estate journalism." The Tuesday filing fits a broader EEOC enforcement push. Under EEOC Chair Andrea Lucas, the agency has sued a Coca-Cola distributor over a women-only networking event and is investigating Nike's diversity hiring practices.
## Media Pioneer Ted Turner Dies at 87
Ted Turner, [the brash media mogul](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAQhZ_GdEb-A5PCxW3octstkc2Mk1k5JjKzQXn7FXmF7Y50pE_nfF_X5RqpUL39jw8MnLel4rEXZMa2PDfGyhQLtVgBY2EE_mkVF6PMKNUglV8gUnkvroOQEQ3aDoP2ftJuct509-Cs1WNyOeaUtF1Xq-MlDzFhck4lyB2Fk6YG5bVS3k39aIcLeHAAdsxeR-EUAvHW-u-NKt8xl_f2wtav26Mr4c783IX9J8wszHwcR7-m_Xxx9sLMZxRmZgT5Gd8kEO4y3lBOXq61CjN3LcDzoFJoH71w6vaIVD58_pOUVzC_AQAA___y4HbA) who launched CNN and reshaped American television, died Wednesday after a long battle with Lewy body dementia. He was 87. Turner, who won the nickname "The Mouth of the South" for his often off-color remarks, inherited his father's Atlanta billboard firm in 1963 and built it into a broadcasting empire, pioneering the "superstation" concept with WTBS and launching TBS, TNT, Cartoon Network, and Turner Classic Movies in the early days of cable. In 1980, Turner debuted CNN, [the first 24-hour cable news network](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ8GOiPbGEwKF9fQ5dor0cKukz05dmQ2QXn7X-QV_m5GI83om3_X5QqcON_-woOCxLJkOvZEIlSXZxHKwpC4QkaCJITyqpkWq-2o9KC0XxA4fRbXYohElvqWgvF-Mm5y3rb3AKsbLHiYxnG9kNfGoTEjrtaDdzG6lsPZpgftjdbeTd3YDxf06BD7MXoDjdOELKV2_wtnuVNMn_Km2m3l0aZwF3nuTf-nsXNj5-M4urxuJ8WZN3Y-ZWPnsrK8oDKdRgjVl6SqLWcVyysjVYVMu5q8qlsGd-lNWwM-D06J99E3Tt8ewOk7K7_66h3sTwAAAP__ZNV-fw), transforming how Americans and indeed the world consumed news. He sold Turner Broadcasting to Time Warner for $7.3 billion in 1996. Turner was an avid sportsman as well. He skippered the winning yacht in the 1977 America's Cup and owned the Atlanta Braves, who won the 1995 World Series. He also became one of America's largest landowners, championing bison conservation. [Here are photos from his life](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHSoyAUhZ8GOxy8gpCCYhu7bLulc5VrZIeAgzdx8_Y75hX-_sw55_v-3Kc7xhTz4zc-yfNapkznkYiZ6rQXpswRU6yYA2FiCvyqmSZQMEhlpLJTwJg-k26CX4mA-oZ8Z63rtNMWms2Tc-DUTDTMi8HZAoJZ0Mxr7xQauDXRX23KKNspZbVrh97cgg06hH5YbYdCKwqRS23_lph5ozV9yptqu5Rnk_zGvB-i_yVgFDCe59mu5Z9BTpgZr4yA8YISMO5b4XLIJedDMgX5hamSt1pej01-COshu1vv5HWpqT7sZ0wpHoMVWj2eGNN3lH9k6u3hfwAAAP__x91-BQ).

clean_body: The White House said Wednesday it is with Iran on a one-page memo that would formally end the 68-day war, with officials expecting Tehran's response within 48 hours. | | | | | | Thursday, May 7, 2026 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1915, the British ocean liner Lusitania was torpedoed by a German submarine, killing over 1,100 people, including 128 Americans, and bringing the U.S. closer to entering World War I. () If you've ever told your spouse you could watch sports for a living, today might be your chance to prove it. A major American broadcaster is paying that for two months this summer. Details below in Sports. Is AI harming your brain? We break down the top five ways to protect yourself from the influence of AI. . Today's sponsor, , helps Americans protect their retirement savings by offering strategies to preserve wealth against inflation and a weakening dollar through investments in physical gold. | US, Iran Closing In on Peace Memo The White House said Wednesday it is with Iran on a one-page memo that would formally end the 68-day war, with officials expecting Tehran's response within 48 hours. The 14-point framework would trigger to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, lift U.S. sanctions, and impose a years-long moratorium on Iranian uranium enrichment. President Trump on Tuesday night , the U.S. naval mission to escort ships through the strait. He warned bombing would resume "at a much higher level" if Iran rejects the deal. Even with talks underway, fighting continued. A U.S. fighter jet trying to break the American blockade Wednesday, and Israel hit Beirut for the first time since last month's Hezbollah ceasefire. Feds Sue NYT For Race, Gender Bias The Equal Employment Opportunity Commission sued the New York Times on Tuesday, alleging the paper in favor of a less-qualified woman to meet its race and gender diversity goals. The 11-year veteran editor, who had extensive experience covering real estate, was cut from the final interview panel for the deputy real estate editor opening last year. The role went to an outside candidate the EEOC described as a non-white female with " in real estate journalism." The Tuesday filing fits a broader EEOC enforcement push. Under EEOC Chair Andrea Lucas, the agency has sued a Coca-Cola distributor over a women-only networking event and is investigating Nike's diversity hiring practices. Media Pioneer Ted Turner Dies at 87 Ted Turner, who launched CNN and reshaped American television, died Wednesday after a long battle with Lewy body dementia. He was 87. Turner, who won the nickname "The Mouth of the South" for his often off-color remarks, inherited his father's Atlanta billboard firm in 1963 and built it into a broadcasting empire, pioneering the "superstation" concept with WTBS and launching TBS, TNT, Cartoon Network, and Turner Classic Movies in the early days of cable. In 1980, Turner debuted CNN, , transforming how Americans and indeed the world consumed news. He sold Turner Broadcasting to Time Warner for $7.3 billion in 1996. Turner was an avid sportsman as well. He skippered the winning yacht in the 1977 America's Cup and owned the Atlanta Braves, who won the 1995 World Series. He also became one of America's largest landowners, championing bison conservation. .
